login.title: Vorratsdatenspeicher
login.errorNetwork: Backend unreachable — is the server running?
login.forgotSent: If that email address exists, a reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.welcomeText: Hi {{name}}, set your password to get started.
reset.invalid: This link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.

receiptEdit.title: Edit receipt
receiptEdit.deleteConfirm: Really delete this receipt and all its items?

receiptDetail.mismatch: Sum of items doesn't match receipt total
receiptDetail.mismatchHint: A line is missing, duplicated, or has the wrong price
receiptDetail.reocrConfirm: Re-analyze receipt photo? All current items will be replaced.

stores.title: Stores
stores.mergeHint: All receipts of this store will move to the target store. This store will disappear.

names.title: Canonical names
names.changeIconHint: Tap to pick from image search

iconPicker.title: Pick icon
iconPicker.hint: Type a query and press enter, then tap an image.

admin.title: Admin
admin.usernameDerivedHint: Username is auto-generated from the email.
admin.youUseProfileForReset: Change your own password via Profile
admin.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account
admin.linkNotEmailed: Email could not be sent — share this link manually:
admin.maintenanceHint: Background AI jobs: categorize new items, clean up canonical names, fetch store logos.
admin.aiTasksHint: Each task uses a provider + model. You can switch per task (e.g. cheap model for simple classification, strong one for vision OCR).
admin.taskRecategorizeDesc: Assigns each item to a category path (e.g. "Food/Fruit/Bananas"). Closed vocabulary — only the defined categories.
admin.taskChurnerStage1Desc: Cleans canonical product names from OCR noise ("BIO BANANE" → "Bananas"). Decides: known name, new name, or web search needed.
admin.taskChurnerStage2Desc: Only invoked when Stage 1 says "web search". Reads SearXNG hits and proposes a name.
admin.taskOcrDesc: Reads receipt photos and extracts date, store, total, and all line items. Used by the "Re-OCR" button on a receipt and by the batch reimport.
admin.taskCategoriesChatDesc: The chat assistant on the categories page that designs a category structure with you.
admin.confidenceHint: Suggestions below the threshold go to the review queue instead of being auto-applied.

profile.title: Profile
profile.exportHint: CSV downloads for spreadsheets, taxes, or backup.

welcome.title: Welcome to Vorratsdatenspeicher!
welcome.body: Let me walk you through the main features. It takes less than a minute. You can skip the tour any time and replay it later from your profile.

receipts.title: Receipts — every shopping trip
receipts.body: When a receipt is scanned via the Telegram bot it lands here with photo, items, and total. Tap an item to fix the name, category, or price — changes at the canonical-name level cascade to all purchases.

stats.title: Statistics — where the money goes
stats.body: Monthly spending per category with end-of-month projection. Set a goal per category (pencil icon) and the app warns you when you're over. The top card shows this-week-vs-last-week trends.

shopping.title: Shopping list — what's running low
shopping.body: Suggestions based on how fast things get used up. "Done" removes it, "Later" snoozes 7 days, "Never" excludes the item for good.

pantry.title: Pantry — what you still have
pantry.body: Estimated remaining quantity and days-until-empty for items you buy regularly. Computed from purchase history + typical consumption.

names.title: Names — canonical labels
names.body: Manage the product names the system has learned. Tap a name → see all receipts, rename (cascades everywhere), and see which store sells it cheapest.

family.title: Family — who eats what
family.body: In Admin you can add family members and tag items ("only Martin eats tuna"). Statistics then lets you filter per person to see who's spending on what.

done.title: You're all set 🎉
done.body: Enjoy Vorratsdatenspeicher! Need a refresher? Replay this tour any time from Profile → Help.

categoriesAdmin.title: Item categories
categoriesAdmin.subtitle: Design your category structure with AI and re-sort your items
categoriesAdmin.linkHint: Restructure categories via AI chat, edit the tree, recategorize items
categoriesAdmin.chatEmpty: Describe how your categories should look — e.g. "I want groceries broken down in more detail, separate drugstore and household, plus a hobby category". The AI knows your real items.
categoriesAdmin.treeHint: Drag to move · double-click to rename · max 3 levels
categoriesAdmin.applyConfirm: The entire category catalog will be replaced (Meta categories are kept). Items keep their old paths until they're recategorized. Continue?
categoriesAdmin.applyHint: "Apply categories" replaces the catalog. Then click "Recategorize all items" so the AI sorts every item into the new structure.
categoriesAdmin.applied: {{count}} categories saved. {{orphans}} items now have stale paths — please recategorize.

trends.anomaly: This week is well above the {{avg}} average
